reviews.review_description: Need the ability to play with out timers and feeling pressured

I really got this app in hopes that there would be levels easy enough for all ages including Kindergartners. But Easy wasn’t easy like Bread, Cheese… Watermelon, Urban”… nahhh. But it sucks that my kid can’t play enjoy it because there is no grade level for Easy. Love the options and different games though.

developer_response.body: We're sorry for any inconveniences caused and that your kid wasn't able to enjoy the game to its full potential. However, it's important to note that our games are designed for 6th-9th grade reading levels. We hope that you'll be able to enjoy the game title in the future and if you ever have any questions or need any support, feel free to reach out at team@skillprepare.com

reviews.review_description: I like how they combined mini games with word scramble and the other reading phonics. I actually get faster as I play too. Really great game for kids and the whole family.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review and support! We're so glad that you enjoyed Reading World VR, and it's awesome that you get faster the more you play it! If you ever have any questions or need support, please feel free to reach out to team@skillprepare.com :)
